content:
2. Should peer review feedback have a ranking system?

✔ Yes. Students need a “Gold” to pass peer review.
✔ If they get Silver or Bronze, they must revise or submit research on good peer review.

3. Should we add a class-wide XP event for full participation?

✔ Yes. If the whole class submits on time, they unlock an event.
✔ Example: Bonus film screening or creative freewrite day.

4. Where should we place the semester-end in-class event?

✔ Final Week: The Academic Mutiny – If a student has passed 3 mastery exams, they run a mock “class revolution” debate or simulation.

🚀 Version 4.5 now integrates all course mechanics fully. Are we locking this in? 🎮📚

📌 Version 4.6 – Finalized Class Structure with Choice-Based Paths, Three-Tiered Decision Points, Unlockable Cosmetics, and Balanced Sections
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 46 (chunk 46/555)
